## Validation

- [ ] `npm run typecheck`
- [ ] `npm run lint`
- [ ] `npm test`
- [ ] `npm run build`
- [ ] `npm run pack:dry-run`

## MCP / Security Impact

- [ ] Tool input/output schemas unchanged or documented
- [ ] No stdout logging added to stdio server code
- [ ] No secrets, tokens, or generated artifacts committed
- [ ] `server.json`, `glama.json`, and docs updated if public tool metadata changed
